languages.text: "Вольный Торговец, вы как раз вовремя! Я готов обсудить с вами интереснейший эксперимент, который мы провели в Секторе Бионика... и на прочих палубах корабля".

languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

languages.text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."
languages.original_text: "Вольный Торговец, вы как раз вовремя! Я готов обсудить с вами интереснейший эксперимент, который мы провели в Секторе Бионика... и на прочих палубах корабля".

traits.locale_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."
"Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."
"Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

languages.text: 「悪党トレーダー、君のタイミングは完璧だ！セクター・ビオニカでの興味深い実験について、そして他のデッキについても話し合いたい」
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

traits.locale_text: 「悪党トレーダー、君のタイミングは完璧だ！セクター・ビオニカでの興味深い実験について、そして他のデッキについても話し合いたい。」

languages.text: “行商浪人，您来得正是时候！我准备好讨论那项我们在仿生区……以及其他甲板上进行的迷人实验了。”
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，您来得正是时候！我准备好讨论那项我们在仿生区……以及其他甲板上进行的迷人实验了。”

languages.text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vous arrivez à point nommé ! Je suis prêt à discuter de l'expérience fascinante que nous menons dans le secteur Bionica... ainsi que sur d'autres ponts. »
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vous arrivez à point nommé ! Je suis prêt à discuter de l'expérience fascinante que nous menons dans le secteur Bionica... ainsi que sur d'autres ponts. »

languages.text: «¡Comerciante, no podía llegar en mejor momento! Estoy listo para hablar del fascinante experimento que hemos estado realizando en el sector Bionica... y en otras cubiertas».
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

traits.locale_text: «¡Comerciante, no podía llegar en mejor momento! Estoy listo para hablar del fascinante experimento que hemos estado realizando en el sector Bionica... y en otras cubiertas».

languages.text: "Hür Tacir, zamanlamanız kusursuz! Sektör Biyonika'da... Ve diğer güvertelerde yürütmekte olduğumuz büyüleyici deney üzerine konuşmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir, zamanlamanız kusursuz! Sektör Biyonika'da... Ve diğer güvertelerde yürütmekte olduğumuz büyüleyici deney üzerine konuşmaya hazırım."

languages.text: "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Euer Timing ist perfekt! Ich bin bereit, das faszinierende Experiment zu besprechen, das wir im Sektor Bionica ... und auf anderen Decks angestellt haben."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."
